messages.content:
```python
FORCE_FINAL_ANSWER_PROMPT_NO_VIDEO='''Based on all the previous conversation and observations, please provide your final answer. Think carefully about all the information you have gathered inside <think> and </think> and give your best answer inside <answer> and </answer>.'''
```
语气强硬一点，就是说现在已经到了截止轮数，必须要做出回答，不要再
```python
selecting temporal segments from the original video
```

可以把提示词改得更“强硬”、更有截止轮数/强制输出的语气，并明确禁止再去做任何“selecting temporal segments from the original video”。下面给你几个可直接替换的版本（从强到更强）：

```python
FORCE_FINAL_ANSWER_PROMPT_NO_VIDEO = """You have reached the final turn and MUST provide the final answer NOW.
Do NOT perform any additional analysis steps or request more information.
Do NOT select temporal segments from the original video (no temporal segmentation, no re-watching, no browsing).
Use ONLY the information already available from the prior conversation and observations.

Return ONLY the final answer inside <answer>...</answer>. No other text."""
```

更强硬/带“截止轮数”措辞：

```python
FORCE_FINAL_ANSWER_PROMPT_NO_VIDEO = """FINAL TURN (deadline reached). Output is REQUIRED now.
STOP all further reasoning/iteration. No more questions. No more steps.
ABSOLUTELY DO NOT select temporal segments from the original video (no segment selection, no timestamps, no re-checking).
Rely strictly on previously collected conversation context and observations.

Provide your final response ONLY inside <answer>...</answer>."""
```

如果你仍想保留 `
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="3">
<summary>Thought for 3 seconds</summary>
> ` 但禁止继续扩展流程（注意有的系统不允许要求模型输出思考链）：
> 
> ```python
> FORCE_FINAL_ANSWER_PROMPT_NO_VIDEO = """Final turn: you must finalize your response now.
> You are not allowed to do any further exploration, verification, or video-related operations.
> Do not select temporal segments from the original video under any circumstances.
> 
> Internally decide your final response, then output ONLY:
> <answer>...</answer>"""
> ```
> 
> 要点：把“必须现在回答”“禁止再做任何视频相关操作/时间片段选择”“只允许输出最终答案”写成硬性规则，并且要求输出格式限制为仅 `<answer>`。
</details>
